concerns.text: FR-015 mandates a KS test comparing baseline reconstruction error metrics (GMM/ARIMA) against the DP-GMM signature distribution. However, User Story 2 (Acceptance Scenario 4) and the 'Statistical Testing' section in the methodology only describe KS tests for DP-GMM signatures vs. normal windows (FR-014) and t-tests for time-to-detection. The specific verification procedure for the baseline-vs-signature KS test required by FR-015 is missing from the User Story acceptance scenarios, creating a gap between the requirement and its testable definition.
